Four ambulances set on fire in London in suspected antisemitic hate crimePolice say they are looking for three suspects after the London Fire Brigade were called to Golders Green at around 01:40 GMT. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyj1p49gdpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyj1p49gdpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:00:41 GMT
UN issues new climate warning as El Niño loomsThe Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 04:06:22 GMT
Plane and ground vehicle collide at New York's LaGuardia airport halting flightsAn Air Canada Express plane suffered significant damage after the collision. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy01g522ww4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy01g522ww4o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 07:02:57 GMT
British couple in Iran prison say situation is 'life-threatening'Craig and Lindsay Foreman are being held in Tehran's Evin prison amid ongoing attacks on Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew72ll8245o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew72ll8245o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:11:00 GMT
'We can't justify a £52 lunch': Middle-income families cut back on days out A household with an average income of £55,000 has cut spending on leisure activities by £40 a week, offical figures suggest. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:03:22 GMT
Grisly or just country life? The mole photos dividing social mediaA hill walker shares a snap of moles hanging on barbed wire and is surprised by the huge response. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:05:18 GMT
France's Socialists hold on to power in major cities in election boost for mainstreamParis and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crk14m7mjddo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crk14m7mjddo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 23:27:59 GMT
Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and propertiesThe violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 22:38:24 GMT

Evan Davis: Heat pumps work for me - but they're not yet a money saverThe government wants Britons to embrace heat pumps. But will they ever make financial sense for the average user? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:04:45 GMT
